title: CLI import failure on fresh setup
symptom: Tests cannot import the package in a cold environment
observed: unittest fails with ModuleNotFoundError before install completes
expected: tests import the package after installation or with a clear documented invocation order
reproduction_steps: Run install and tests in parallel.
Observe the import error from unittest.

evidence.excerpt: -python@v5 with: python-version: "3.12" - name: Install package run: python -m pip install -e . - name: Run unit tests run: python -m unittest discover -s tests -v - name: Smoke test repo map run: python -m aidrp repo-map --project-root . --output-dir .aidrp
